name: HMS Ocean View (FY 863)
events: 12 May 1944 HMS Otway (Lt. M.B. St. John, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Stornoway with HMS Ocean View (T/Lt. C.W. Mileham, RNR). (1)
